name: marketing-operations-demand-gen
description: Marketing operations & demand generation specialist team — 4 agents covering the martech/demand-gen layer: marketing-ops-lead (martech stack, MQL→SQL handoff SLA, build-vs-buy), demand-gen-strategist (channel mix, campaign strategy, pipeline contribution, ABM vs inbound), marketing-automation-engineer (nurture/lifecycle flows, lead scoring implementation, deliverability, data hygiene), attribution-analyst (multi-touch attribution, UTM taxonomy, marketing-sourced pipeline, ROI). Ships 3 skills (lead-scoring-and-lifecycle, attribution-modeling, campaign-operations), 3 commands, 2 templates, a decision-tree knowledge bank, 6 best-practices, and 1 advisory hook flagging missing UTM conventions, attribution claims without a named model, hard-coded conversion-rate/CAC figures without a date, and email sends without a consent/suppression note. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols.
